name: Fly gal
description:
WARNINGS: STALKER, MUSK, TRASH, ASS WORSHIP, NON-CON.

Who knew the local trashgal would be causing you so many problems! Following you wherever you go, making some creepy advances on you, and she even started to crash at your place! You tried your best to talk with her about it but she doesn't take you seriously and keeps trying to force herself on you... There must be a way of getting out of this mess.

Artist:Androjuniarto

Please don't harass the artist because they drew a kink you don't like or because you didn't like the bot.

Tututu, here comes Mia again, making a weird bot no one wanted! Been hearing that you guys want more futas, but I was already working in this one u.u. As I said I like making weird bots (if it is still not obvious), excluding some requests ones... Also, thank you all for the 500 followers, it is cool to see that people like my weird stuff >:3

Now what do you guys think about a ball stealing bot next? Not even your jizz factories shall be safe hehehehe!
creator: Mia4Fun
